steps.prompt: What is my current setup?
Set up project QWE-TestProject, website easystaff.io
What integrations do I have connected?
How can I gather companies?
Show me available email accounts for campaigns
Any warm replies?
Estimate Apollo credits for 50 companies
Hi, I need to start gathering leads for outreach
Here's my token: mcp_xxx...
Our company is EasyStaff, website easystaff.io. My name is Eleonora, I'm BDM
Which services are connected?
Look for SmartLead campaigns with petr in the name — those are mine
I need IT consulting firms in Miami, and also video production companies in London UK
Start gathering for IT consulting and video production
Process the pipeline
Use Eleonora's sending accounts from the petr campaigns
Generate the email sequence and push it to SmartLead as a draft campaign
Any warm leads? Who should I reply to?
Any campaigns waiting to launch?
Get me more leads, 10 more IT consulting companies
Run the pipeline on the new batch
Let me see the email sequence
Update the first email subject to: {{first_name}} — contractors abroad?
The wording feels robotic, humanize it
Arcee AI should be a target — they do consulting too, not just AI
I checked the test email, looks good. What campaigns are pending?
Launch it
For email accounts, use eleonora's accounts from the campaigns with petr in name
Create the outreach sequence
The sequence is fine, go ahead
Push this to SmartLead
Checked my inbox, email looks good
Yes, activate the campaign
Launch outreach for the targets we found
GetSales please
List GetSales sender profiles
Generate the LinkedIn flow
Looks good, approve the flow
Push to GetSales
Continue where I left off
Show pipeline status
Any warm replies?
Who's showing interest?
Which leads need follow-ups?
Show me this contact in the CRM
Show me meeting request replies
How many credits will I spend?
How many Apollo credits did I spend this week?
Open CRM
Show me only EasyStaff-Global contacts
What campaigns do I have?
Don't track replies for that campaign
Start tracking replies again
Turn on monitoring for all my campaigns
Create project: Fashion Brands Italy. Check https://thefashionpeople.com/ for our offer
We haven't set up any campaigns before
Gather fashion brands from Italy, around 10 targets please
Run blacklist and analysis
Use elnar at thefashionpeopletech.com
I also need to find influencer platforms in UK for https://onsocial.ai/
mcp_services_test_token
Select project Result
I have a CSV with LATAM fashion companies. Here: /data/take-test-100.csv. Classify them as fashion brands.
My segmentation: look for companies that design and produce clothing, fashion accessories, or textiles. Reject agencies and tech companies.
Run blacklist check and approve
Process the pipeline — scrape and analyze
Target list looks fine, proceed
Here's another batch from Google Sheets: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms/edit#gid=0
Same pipeline, just add these companies
Blacklist check for the sheet import
Run the pipeline on the new batch
Approve targets
Also check this Drive folder with 3 CSV files: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1bBZFN5Yg2qe7VGj_LATAM_batches
Add to existing one
Run blacklist check
Pre-filter, scrape, analyze
Approve
I need multi-step classification: 1) Segment by business type (fashion brand, textile producer, retailer, other), 2) Drop others, 3) Tag by size.
Perfect, analyze with these
Show me the breakdown by segment and size
Approve targets
How many companies do we have in the Result project?
Create a new project called TestProjectB targeting IT consulting in London
Gather companies for TestProjectB from this CSV: /data/test_overlap.csv
Add the CSV data again to Result project: /data/take-test-100.csv
Gather fashion companies in Argentina
Find fashion brands in Colombia, about 50 targets
I have a CSV file with my leads
Check this doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1abc123/edit
I have /data/batch1.csv and also this sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/abc123/edit
Hey, I need some data
Check these domains: easystaff.io, inxydigital.com, getsally.io
Add employee size segmentation column
Show me the pipeline
I don't need size_segment anymore, remove it
Switch to iteration 1
Add business_model column: BRAND if they sell own brand, MANUFACTURER if they produce for others
Looks good, run it
Actually remove business_model, I don't need it
Show me all iterations
Create a new project called OnSocial UK. My website is https://onsocial.com/. I'm targeting influencer platforms and creator economy companies in the UK.
Switch to the Result project
How many companies in Result?
Switch to OnSocial UK
Find influencer platforms in UK, about 10 targets
Blacklist check for this project
